mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, component, redirect, icon, title, sort_order, show_link, keep_alive, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, component, redirect, icon, title, sort_order, show_link, keep_alive, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM menu WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.redirect, m.icon, m.title, m.sort_order, m.show_link, m.keep_alive, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at, m.is_deleted FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.redirect, m.icon, m.title, m.sort_order, m.show_link, m.keep_alive, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at, m.is_deleted FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN role r ON rm.role_id = r.id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC
